name: strava
description: Safari-authenticated Strava route tooling and route-builder notes for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create and inspect Strava routes through Safari-authenticated workflows.
interface.longDescription: Strava captures the Safari/curl route-builder workflow learned locally: authenticated route-page fetches, in-page build-route/create-route/update-route API calls, GPX import caveats, and VT1 route scoring that penalizes footways, cycleway shortcuts, crossings, barriers, and traffic interruptions.
capabilities: VT1 route scoring from BRouter GeoJSON
Strava route creation and update guidance
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Safari-authenticated Strava workflows when working with my Strava routes.
